creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Mon Aug 19 14:35:14 2013
New Revision: 324996
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/324996

Log:
  dns/zkt: update to 1.1.2
  
  - Update to 1.1.2 [1]
  - Trim Makefile header [1]
  - Remove MAKE_JOBS_SAFE and useless port.{pre,post}.mk
  
  PR:		ports/181379
  Submitted by:	Frank Behrens <frank harz2014.behrens.de> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/dns/zkt/Makefile
  head/dns/zkt/distinfo

Modified: head/dns/zkt/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/dns/zkt/Makefile	Mon Aug 19 14:12:48 2013	(r324995)
+++ head/dns/zkt/Makefile	Mon Aug 19 14:35:14 2013	(r324996)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:   zkt
-# Date created:        2008-08-06
-# Whom:                Frank Behrens
-#
+# Created by: Frank Behrens
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=		zkt
-DISTVERSION=		1.1.0
+DISTVERSION=		1.1.2
 CATEGORIES=		dns
 MASTER_SITES=		http://www.hznet.de/dns/zkt/
 
@@ -28,8 +24,6 @@ MAN8=			dnssec-zkt.8 \
 GNU_CONFIGURE=		yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-configpath=${DIR_NAMED_CONF}
 
-.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
-
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/var/named/|${DIR_NAMED_CONF}/|g' ${WRKSRC}/man/*.8
 
@@ -45,4 +39,4 @@ do-install:
 	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/zkt-ls.8 ${PREFIX}/man/man8/
 	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/zkt-signer.8 ${PREFIX}/man/man8/
 
-.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/dns/zkt/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/dns/zkt/distinfo	Mon Aug 19 14:12:48 2013	(r324995)
+++ head/dns/zkt/distinfo	Mon Aug 19 14:35:14 2013	(r324996)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (zkt-1.1.0.tar.gz) = 887e04ce5aa85d84af57852794d2388cbd67516a5e5c9fcd1b8270d2f41e7a26
-SIZE (zkt-1.1.0.tar.gz) = 343811
+SHA256 (zkt-1.1.2.tar.gz) = ee753368e7e87930b4762125803b6465211d9ba1af2cc1ed0b617a4e515be09a
+SIZE (zkt-1.1.2.tar.gz) = 343388
